allow: Bash(mkdir -p "D:/vision/mathcut-front/docs/refactor" && git -C "D:/vision/mathcut-front" mv CODE_REVIEW.md docs/refactor/CODE_REVIEW.md && git -C "D:/vision/mathcut-front" mv REFACTOR_PLAN.md docs/refactor/REFACTOR_PLAN.md && git -C "D:/vision/mathcut-front" mv REFACTOR_FINAL.md docs/refactor/REFACTOR_FINAL.md && echo "Done")
